name: Bridge City Pickleball Courts
description: Bridge City Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Bridge City, TX. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Evolution Health & Fitness
description: Evolution Health & Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Orange, TX. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. The courts are free.

name: Orange Recreational Center
description: Orange Recreational Center is a place to play pickleball in Orange, TX. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Free for Orange residents, $5 per day for non residents

name: Vidor Pickleball Courts
description: Vidor Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Vidor, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
